case_title: PATEL, PRAKASH vs. CAMPBELL, EDWARD et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES FILED BY DEFENDANT CAMPBELL, EDWARD ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, PRAKASH SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR SEP-15-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 03 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON SEP-21-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
TRIAL ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 01

JUDGE BENSON, BETH WILBER - CLERK, MARCIE HOLMES - REPORTER 11:20AM C/C FOR COURT TRIAL, JURY WAIVED DUE TO NON-APPEAR- ANCE OF DEFT. ON TRIAL DATE. DEFT. NOT PRESENT, RICHARD LIEBERMAN APPEARING FOR PLTF. (MR. RENE BOWSER APPEARING AS AN OBSERVER FOR DEFT, BUT IS NOT AN ATTORNEY, AND COULD NOT REPRESENT DEFT) 11:22AM PRAKASH PATEL S/E 11:25AM EXH 1 NOTICE TO QUIT ID/EV 11:30AM WITNESS EXCUSED, NO FURTHER QUESTIONS 11:35AM COURT JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLTF. AND AGAINST DEFT. FOR POSSESSION OF PREMISES AT 2162 MARKET, #36; COSTS, AND DAMAGES OF $12.00 PER DAY FROM 7/1/94 ACCORDING TO PROOF. PLTF. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT. EXH 1 RETAINED BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CAMPBELL, EDWARD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2162 MARKET ST. ROOM 36, LEASE FORFEITED, RENTAL AGREEMENT DECLARED FORFEITED, VOID AND OF NO EFFECT; (SEE FILE FOR DETAIL)
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, PRAKASH AS TO DEFENDANT CAMPBELL, EDWARD DOES 1 THROUGH 25, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED
LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 06, DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, CALENDAR OF AUG-15-1994, OVERRULED 5 DAYS TO ANSWER.
PHOTOCOPY FOR DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 25, INCLUSIVE
